content.problemStatement:
### What You Can Build with Flask

Once you gain a solid understanding of Flask, you can build powerful and dynamic web applications that go far beyond static HTML using PYTHON.

The example shown here is a demonstration of what’s possible with Flask – combining routing, templates, and user interaction.

🛠️ **By the end of this course, you will have the skills to build applications like this – dynamic, interactive, and powered by Python on the backend.**

#### Important Note for Students and Developers

This project depends on several external libraries that need to be installed before execution. Please allow a few moments for all dependencies to be fully downloaded and installed.

**Tip:** Avoid running or submitting the program until the installation process is complete to prevent runtime errors or unexpected behavior.

Once the setup is finished, you may proceed to run or submit your solution confidently.
